title: 9 Signs Scripture Says a Man Wasn't Built to Do This Alone
caption:
Isolation was the first thing God ever called "not good," before sin, before the fall, before anything went wrong.

If your real prayer request hasn't left your head in months, if your only accountability is an app, if you're quietly proud of how long you've carried it alone, that's not strength. Ecclesiastes 4:10 says woe to the man who falls with no one close enough to notice.

Every man who says he doesn't need brothers is further gone than he thinks.

#faith #brotherhood #christianman #community #godlyman
